page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1ne.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated physical cores utilizing an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The single-core performance is relatively weak, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1108.19 and a Geekbench single-core score of 927.0, both falling into the bottom 25% or lower. However, multi-core execution scales to average levels, as shown by a stress-ng multi-core score of 5884.21 and a Passmark CPU score of 7009.7. Memory bandwidth remains stable at average tiers, with uncached read speeds of 40.86 GB/sec and uncached write speeds of 35.89 GB/sec.

The instance exhibits performance limitations in single-threaded tasks, such as gzip compression and bzip3 decompression, which register in the lower percentiles. Similarly, database operations and static web serving throughput are constrained, with Redis SET operations achieving 5.68 million operations per second. Given the 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for parallelizable, compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints or local storage, such as multi-threaded batch processing, basic software compilation, and lightweight model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1ne.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz and 16.0 GB of system memory. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark data shows weak single-core performance, with a Geekbench single-core score of 927.0, but average multi-core scaling, reflected in a stress-ng multi-core score of 5884.21. Memory bandwidth is average, with uncached read speeds of 40.86 GB/sec. Due to its 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is best suited for parallelized compute tasks, multi-threaded batch processing, and lightweight software compilation where high single-thread performance and local storage are not critical requirements.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn1ne.2xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, suited for multi-threaded batch workloads.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core x86_64 compute instance with a 1:2 memory-to-CPU ratio, optimized for parallelized batch processing workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 physical cores at 2.5 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory (2.0 GB per core)
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Average multi-core performance with weak single-core execution
Best suited for parallelized batch processing and lightweight compilation
